title: BEM-863C Claude smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/codex/proofs','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:08 (UTC+3)'
record=Path('scripts/record_claude_code_action_smoke_state.py')
record.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import sys
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from pathlib import Path
SEP="\n"
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
STATE=Path("governance/state/claude_code_action_smoke_state.json")
REPORT=Path("governance/reports/claude_code_action_smoke_state.md")
mode=sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "unknown"
outcome=sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else "unknown"
now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")
try:
    data=json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")) if STATE.exists() else {}
except Exception:
    data={}
runs=data.get("runs",[]) if isinstance(data.get("runs"),list) else []
runs.append({"time":now,"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome})
data.update({"schema_version":"claude_code_action_smoke_state.v1","status":mode,"last_outcome":outcome,"updated_at":now,"runs":runs[-50:],"operator_role":"none"})
STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
STATE.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
REPORT.write_text("# Claude Code Action Smoke State"+SEP+SEP+"Status: "+mode+SEP+"Outcome: "+outcome+SEP+"Updated: "+now+SEP+"Operator role: none"+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status":mode,"outcome":outcome,"updated_at":now},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
commit=Path('scripts/commit_claude_code_action_smoke_state.sh')
commit.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
git add -A governance/state/claude_code_action_smoke_state.json governance/reports/claude_code_action_smoke_state.md governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt || true
git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No smoke state changes" || git commit -m "BEM-863C Claude Code Action smoke state"
git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
git push || true
''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-code-action-smoke.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Code Action Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: read

concurrency:
  group: claude-code-action-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check helpers
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/record_claude_code_action_smoke_state.py
      - name: Record smoke start
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_code_action_smoke_state.py started started
      - name: Claude Code Action smoke
        id: claude_smoke
        continue-on-error: true
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        with:
          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          prompt: |
            You are Claude Code Action smoke test for ai-devops-system.
            Create or update governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem863c_claude_code_action_smoke_response.md.
            Include Decision: APPROVED if this action can write the file, otherwise Decision: BLOCKED with a non-secret reason.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
          claude_args: |
            --max-turns 4
      - name: Record smoke completion
        if: always()
        env:
          CLAUDE_SMOKE_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.claude_smoke.outcome }}
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_code_action_smoke_state.py completed "$CLAUDE_SMOKE_OUTCOME"
      - name: Commit smoke state and response
        if: always()
        run: bash scripts/commit_claude_code_action_smoke_state.sh
''')
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem863c_claude_code_action_smoke.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-863C | Claude Code Action Smoke'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Goal: prove claude-code-action@v1 can run and write a response file. If blocked, write non-secret blocker. No issue comments.'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-863C','status':'claude_code_action_smoke_workflow_installed','workflow':str(wf),'next_action':'queue workflow dispatch and verify smoke state plus response file','created_at':created,'blocker':None}
Path('governance/state/bem863c_claude_action_smoke_no_pr_perm.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem863c_claude_action_smoke_no_pr_perm.md').write_text('# BEM-863C | Claude Action Smoke | INSTALLED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem863c_next.md').write_text('Next: dispatch claude-code-action-smoke.yml and verify state/response.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-863C'+sep+sep+'Claude Code Action smoke installed. Next: dispatch and verify. Reports do not stop development.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem863c_claude_action_smoke_no_pr_perm','status':'installed','created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem863c_claude_action_smoke_no_pr_perm.txt').write_text('BEM-863C installed Claude Code Action smoke workflow.
')
changed_files.extend([str(record),str(commit),str(wf),str(mail),'governance/state/bem863c_claude_action_smoke_no_pr_perm.json','governance/reports/bem863c_claude_action_smoke_no_pr_perm.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem863c_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl','governance/codex/proofs/bem863c_claude_action_smoke_no_pr_perm.txt'])
ops_applied.append('Installed claude-code-action smoke workflow without PR permission token that blocked executor')
"""
No issue comments.
